Autonomy Is the Bug: Why Self-Driving Agents Hallucinate When the Model Barely Does
items.summary: A frontier model hallucinates ~1% on a single task. Chain it into a 20-step autonomous agent and the math guarantees failure most of the time, no matter how good the model is. Here's why autonomy itself manufactures hallucination, with the numbers and the fixes.
